name: jellyamp
title: Jellyamp
description: Search and play music from your Jellyfin server
author: opkelde

commands.name: search-music
commands.title: Search Music
commands.subtitle: Jellyamp
commands.description: Search tracks, albums, and artists on your Jellyfin server

preferences.name: serverUrl
preferences.title: Server URL
preferences.description: Your Jellyfin server URL (e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8096). You can also set this inside the extension on first run.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Your Jellyfin API key. Generate one in Jellyfin: Administration → API Keys → + New Key

preferences.name: userId
preferences.title: User ID
preferences.description: Your Jellyfin User ID. Find it in Administration → Users → click your user → copy the ID from the URL

preferences.name: username
preferences.title: Username
preferences.description: Your Jellyfin username (used if no API Key is provided)

preferences.name: password
preferences.title: Password
preferences.description: Your Jellyfin password (used if no API Key is provided)

preferences.name: mediaPlayerPath
preferences.title: Media Player Executable (Advanced)
preferences.description: Optional: full path to a specific media player (e.g. C:\Program Files\DAUM\PotPlayer\PotPlayer64.exe). Leave blank to use your OS default for .m3u playlist files.
preferences.placeholder: Leave blank for automatic (uses OS default media player)

preferences.name: audioCodec
preferences.title: Stream Audio Codec
preferences.description: Preferred audio codec for streaming. 'copy' streams the original format.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
